ice_cream.label: Pint-size Ice Cream
ice_cream.tagline: Take-home pints — impulse demand spikes the moment heat runs above normal.
ice_cream.creative_angle: Lean into the break in the weather: "It hit {temp_f}° — earn the treat." Late-afternoon and evening freezer runs.

freezer_pops.label: Freezer Pops
freezer_pops.tagline: Kid-led, hyper-elastic: the cheapest cool-down, first to move on a hot snap.
freezer_pops.creative_angle: Family + value cue: "{temp_f}° outside — stock the freezer." Multipack, basket-builder messaging.

cold_brew.label: Cold Brew Coffee
cold_brew.tagline: The warm-to-cold cue flip: iced overtakes hot when it runs warmer than usual.
cold_brew.creative_angle: Reframe the daily ritual: "Iced, for the {temp_f}° morning." Commute and mid-afternoon day-parts.

electrolyte.label: Electrolyte Mix
electrolyte.tagline: Hydration lifts with above-normal heat and sweat — function over flavour.
electrolyte.creative_angle: Performance + replenishment: "Out-sweat the {temp_f}°." Gym, jobsite and youth-sport occasions.

sparkling.label: Sparkling Water
sparkling.tagline: A gentle lift — the everyday fridge-filler nudges up on warmer-than-normal days.
sparkling.creative_angle: Light refreshment: "Fizz for a {temp_f}° afternoon." Multipack pantry-load, no-calorie cue.

sunscreen.label: Sunscreen
sunscreen.tagline: Sun-protection demand spikes with hotter, brighter-than-normal days.
sunscreen.creative_angle: Preparedness, not panic: "{temp_f}° and clear — cover up." UV/outdoor occasions, same-day pickup.

swimwear.label: Swimwear
swimwear.tagline: Discretionary and weather-triggered — an early warm spell pulls the season forward.
swimwear.creative_angle: Bring the season forward: "{temp_f}° already? Dive in." Pool, lake and coastal trip occasions.

bug_spray.label: Insect Repellent
bug_spray.tagline: Warm, muggy spells above normal wake the bugs — and the category.
bug_spray.creative_angle: Protect the outdoors: "Warm nights, more bites." Patio, camping and evening-outdoor occasions.

portable_ac.label: Portable AC
portable_ac.tagline: The sharpest mover of all — a heat anomaly converts shoppers to buyers fast.
portable_ac.creative_angle: Urgency + relief: "{temp_f}° indoors is optional." Units + same-week install windows.

garden_centre.label: Garden Centre
garden_centre.tagline: Mild-to-warm departures pull weekend gardeners out earlier than the calendar.
garden_centre.creative_angle: Catch the first nice weekend: "{temp_f}° — get planting." Soil, seedlings and tool baskets.

soup.label: Ready Soup
soup.tagline: Comfort demand rises when it turns colder than the local normal.
soup.creative_angle: Sell warmth on the turn: "When it dropped, we were ready." Evening dwell-time, cosy at-home messaging.

hot_cocoa.label: Hot Cocoa
hot_cocoa.tagline: Hot-drink demand climbs as temperatures fall below normal — treat, not staple.
hot_cocoa.creative_angle: Cosy occasion: "Colder than usual — warm up." Family, after-school and weekend-treat moments.

herbal_tea.label: Herbal Tea
herbal_tea.tagline: A steady lift on cool-than-normal days — wellness and wind-down cues.
herbal_tea.creative_angle: Everyday comfort: "A cooler-than-usual evening calls for it." Wind-down and morning rituals.

lip_balm.label: Lip Balm
lip_balm.tagline: Cold, dry departures crack lips — a tiny basket-add that moves with the chill.
lip_balm.creative_angle: Impulse at the till: "Cold snap incoming — protect." Front-of-store, multipack add-ons.

slow_cooker.label: Slow Cooker
slow_cooker.tagline: Hearty-cooking demand rises on colder-than-normal stretches.
slow_cooker.creative_angle: Plan-ahead comfort: "Set it for the cold snap." Weekend grocery + meal-prep occasions.

firewood.label: Firewood & Logs
firewood.tagline: A genuine cold-snap buy — stocks up hard when it runs below normal.
firewood.creative_angle: Beat the chill: "Colder than forecast — stock up." Bundle + delivery, fireplace and fire-pit occasions.
